title: Ex-RAF test pilot says Chinook crashed on 'show flight'

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Ex-RAF test pilot says Chinook crashed on 'show flight'. A Chinook helicopter that crashed in Scotland more than 30 years ago, killing 29 people, was being flown as a "show flight" after safety...

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Ex-RAF test pilot says Chinook crashed on 'show flight'
